nasb.text: Therefore repent of this wickedness of yours, and pray the Lord that, if possible, the intention of your heart may be forgiven you.

esv.text: Repent, therefore, of this wickedness of yours, and pray to the Lord that, if possible, the intent of your heart may be forgiven you.

cnv.text: 所以，你要悔改離棄這罪惡，要祈求主，也許你心中的意念可以得到赦免。

ccb.text: 你要悔改，离弃邪恶，向主祷告，或许主会赦免你心中的邪念。

csbs.text: 所以你应当为这恶事悔改，向主祈求，或许你心中的意念因此被赦免。
